## FAQs on KPR Institute of Engineering & Technology Coimbatore Fees
#### What is the annual fee for B.Tech under government quota?
The annual tuition fee is ₹85,000 for government quota students.

# KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology: Courses, Admission 2025, Fees, Scholarship, Placements, Ranking
## KPR Institute of Engineering and Technology Scholarships
The college offers academic and sports scholarships to support deserving and outstanding students financially. Students admitted to the B.Tech program are eligible for a fee waiver, with the percentage of the waiver determined by their merit in the JEE qualifying score. A 100% tuition fee waiver is available for those who achieve the highest merit. Below are the details regarding these scholarships:

**Academic Scholarship
**

| ** Cutoff ** | ** Fee Waiver (%)
** |

|  200-190  |  100% Fee Waiver in Tuition Fee + Hostel/Transport
|

|
|  179.75-170  |  50
|
|  169.75-160  |  25  |
